description.ko: 자연의 상호 연결성을 시각화한 작품으로, 황금빛 생체 발광 흐름 속에 숨 쉬는 유기적 신경망을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A visualization of the interconnectedness of nature, depicting a breathing neural network of organic life in a state of golden luminescent flow.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Mycelial Pulse.' A complex network of #7FB069 emerald moss-like filaments and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular roots forming an interconnected organic brain. The structure is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light that weave through semi-permeable membranes. Macro focus on the cellular permeability and internal glowing sap channels. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow.
